extracted.title: REMINDER: A5 – West of Corning CS Maintenance April 14th
extracted.description:
Millennium Pipeline Company (MPC) would like to remind customers of the upcoming maintenace West of Corning Compressor Station beginning with the Timely cycle for Gas Day Tuesday, April 14, 2026.

Segment(s) Restriction(s)
There are no segment restrictions necessary for this outage

Point(s) Restriction(s)
The following locations will be reduced to 0 Total capacity (Receipts and Deliveries) for the duration of the maintenance:
- Arlington Storage Company (Loc prop 640477)
- Independence (Loc prop 634444)

AutoPAL Availability
At this time, AutoPAL remains available.
As a reminder to customers, the intent of the AutoPAL service is to utilize nominal quantities to resolve minor pool imbalances that result from small upstream or downstream reductions during the Gas Day. These quantities are then paid back the next cycle of the Gas Day.
MPC will monitor AutoPAL activity and reserves the right to make AutoPAL unavailable.

RCC’s
Reservation Charge Credits will be determined per the process set forth in Section 15 of MPC’s FERC Gas tariff.

Questions
If you have questions, please contact Customer Services at 866-581-6487.
Please continue to monitor our Critical Notices for updates on progress as well.
